title: Finding a percentage of a quantity

steps.instruction: Write the percentage as a decimal.
Multiply the decimal by the quantity.

title: Expressing one quantity as a percentage of another

steps.instruction: Write the first quantity as a fraction of the second.
Multiply by $100$ to convert the fraction to a percentage.
State the answer as a percentage.

title: Finding the original amount after a percentage increase
problem: After a $15\%$ increase, an item costs $\$92$. Find the original price.

steps.instruction: Identify the multiplier. A $15\%$ increase means the new price is $115\%$ of the original.
Solve for the original price by dividing by the multiplier.
Check: apply the $15\%$ increase to the original price.
